name: 16p13_3_subtelomere_cap
description: 16pter subtelomeric SD cap distal to the alpha-globin cluster. Small SD modules paralogous to other subtelomeres, plus the 16p telomere-adjacent satellite. Site of subtelomeric translocations breaking distal of HBA.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules of ~5-30 kb at ~95-97% identity; share content with other subtelomeres.
